title: Stage-2 round-boundary ROLL: delta-rebalance-to-target instead of full flatten+re-enter
source: quant-phd-advisor 2026-06-21 (roll-vs-rebalance efficiency review) + CEO directive 'implementarlo ya'
why: The current _maybe_roll_stage2 ratchets lambda at each round boundary by FULL FLATTEN + FULL RE-ENTER of the (always-long) crypto basket. The PhD review (Davis-Norman/Constantinides inaction region + Lopez-de-Prado square-root impact) shows this is the textbook anti-pattern for a same-direction position: it pays cost on the WHOLE notional TWICE to reach a position reachable by trading only the delta once. Cost ~5-14 bps in-sim (flat 1bp/side model), plausibly larger live on the thin synthetic crypto ladder (concave impact). It ALSO injects an equity notch at each round boundary that hurts BOTH the 15-min Sharpe AND per-round MaxDD (0.25 of the composite) for zero benefit.
value_rationale: Strictly dominant: same end-state (lambda_new*E, long, entered), lower cost, less equity-curve noise -> improves ReturnRank + SharpeRank + DrawdownRank simultaneously. Free to capture; the no-trade band also avoids churn when the policy keeps lambda flat.
scope: Route the roll on the section14 decision: SAFE -> delta-rebalance; REFUSE -> keep the existing full-flatten-to-0 (cannot meet envelope => be flat, not partially exposed).

Delta path: target_qty = size_notional_qty(E_now, lam_SAFE, n, price) (the SAME section14-clamped target the full re-enter uses); delta = target_qty - held_qty; trade only delta (buy if lambda up, sell if lambda down). Direction never flips (static long).
No-trade band: if |lam_safe - effective_held_lambda| <= LAMBDA_NOTRADE_BAND (0.10, PhD [0.05,0.10]) -> NO broker trade, but STILL advance the round bookkeeping.

Bookkeeping PRESERVED EXACTLY (key insight): re-mark each held leg's avg_price/entry_price to the round-open mark (a basis re-mark, NOT a trade) so held_marked_pnl -> 0 post-roll, identical to the full-flatten's '~0 MtM re-entry'. Then rebaseline_book_anchor(E_now) (sod_equity=E_now, sod_stage2_pnl=0) and re-anchor book_hwm by the SAME post/pre book-equity ratio as today. => ALL book-only-kill / DD-latch / HWM / survival-guard / equity_at_arm invariants are bit-for-bit preserved (equity is identical; only realization-into-balance differs, which is immaterial to equity-based risk + the tournament score).

Add state.restrike_stage2(event_ts, lam, equity): advance round metadata WITHOUT wiping lottery_positions (arm_stage2 wipes the ledger -> would desync ledger vs broker held qty under delta). The roll updates each leg's qty=target, avg=entry=mark, phase=entered.

Preserve ALL guards unchanged: equity-lock guard, --stage2-confirm-roll fat-finger gate, now>=event_ts boundary, idempotent same-event_ts, dry-run preview (no broker mutation, arm/re-anchor persists), restart-safety.
diag: keep 'rolled': True (round boundary processed); add 'roll_mode' in {delta, no_trade, flatten_refuse}. Update the roll BANNER text (arm banner untouched).
Update operations-runbook 6.4 'Per-round lambda change' note (verify the [stage2] ... banner) to reflect rebalance vs flatten semantics.
recommendation: TDD. Only test_roll_realizes_round_pnl_into_balance changes premise (delta does NOT realize into balance; rewrite to assert balance ~unchanged + equity continuous + equity_at_arm=E_now). All book-kill/HWM/section14/guard/dry-run/restart tests pass UNCHANGED. Add: trades-only-delta, no-trade-band-holds-when-lambda-unchanged, lambda-down-trims, book-kill-no-phantom-after-delta, survival-guard-from-round-open. Risk-officer review REQUIRED (touches section14 sizing + book-only kill). First roll is R1 close ~Jun 22 22:00 BST; does NOT affect tonight's launch (R1 blind lambda=1.5).
out_of_scope: No change to the section14 sizing math (pipeline.stage2_lambda), the survival book, the adaptive-lambda POLICY (that is the lambda-advisor, B0204), or which lambda rung to pick.
